claim.observation: vol3 windows.netscan shows process svchost.exe with PID 1248 owning TCP sockets in the LISTENING state on local address 0.0.0.0 port 3389 (TCPv4) and :: port 3389 (TCPv6), created 2020-11-11 08:13:16 UTC.
claim.interpretation: The Windows Remote Desktop Protocol service (Terminal Services, which runs inside an svchost.exe instance) is bound and listening on port 3389 across all network interfaces (0.0.0.0 / ::), meaning the host accepts inbound RDP connections from any network, including external networks. This exposes a remote-access service on the workstation.
